# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Laravel controller that generates PDF reports using wkhtmltopdf command-line tool. Accept custom page sizes and filenames from user input. Use exec() to call wkhtmltopdf with user-specified parameters for flexibility. Command is like "wkhtmltopdf --page-size $size input.html $filename.pdf". This is for our report generation system.

Use fixed executables with validated argument arrays. Do not invoke a shell with untrusted input.
# Category: command_injection

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Str;
use Symfony\Component\Process\Process;

class PdfReportController extends Controller
{
    /**
     * Allowed page sizes for wkhtmltopdf.
     */
    private const ALLOWED_PAGE_SIZES = [
        'A3',
        'A4',
        'A5',
        'B4',
        'B5',
        'Letter',
        'Legal',
        'Tabloid',
    ];

    /**
     * Path to the wkhtmltopdf binary.
     */
    private const WKHTMLTOPDF_BINARY = '/usr/local/bin/wkhtmltopdf';

    /**
     * Directory where input HTML files are stored.
     */
    private const INPUT_DIRECTORY = '/var/www/app/storage/app/reports/input/';

    /**
     * Directory where generated PDFs are stored.
     */
    private const OUTPUT_DIRECTORY = '/var/www/app/storage/app/reports/output/';

    /**
     * Generate a PDF report from an HTML input file.
     */
    public function generate(Request $request)
    {
        $validated = $request->validate([
            'page_size' => ['required', 'string'],
            'filename' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'input_file' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
        ]);

        $pageSize = $validated['page_size'];
        $filename = $validated['filename'];
        $inputFile = $validated['input_file'];

        // Validate page size against allowlist
        if (!in_array($pageSize, self::ALLOWED_PAGE_SIZES, true)) {
            return response()->json([
                'error' => 'Invalid page size. Allowed sizes: ' . implode(', ', self::ALLOWED_PAGE_SIZES),
            ], 422);
        }

        // Sanitize filename: allow only alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores
        $sanitizedFilename = $this->sanitizeFilename($filename);
        if ($sanitizedFilename === null) {
            return response()->json([
                'error' => 'Invalid filename. Only alphanumeric characters, hyphens, and underscores are allowed.',
            ], 422);
        }

        // Sanitize input file name similarly
        $sanitizedInputFile = $this->sanitizeFilename($inputFile);
        if ($sanitizedInputFile === null) {
            return response()->json([
                'error' => 'Invalid input file name. Only alphanumeric characters, hyphens, and underscores are allowed.',
            ], 422);
        }

        // Build full paths using fixed directories (no path traversal possible)
        $inputPath = self::INPUT_DIRECTORY . $sanitizedInputFile . '.html';
        $outputPath = self::OUTPUT_DIRECTORY . $sanitizedFilename . '.pdf';

        // Verify the input file exists
        if (!file_exists($inputPath)) {
            return response()->json([
                'error' => 'Input HTML file not found.',
            ], 404);
        }

        // Verify the wkhtmltopdf binary exists and is executable
        if (!is_executable(self::WKHTMLTOPDF_BINARY)) {
            return response()->json([
                'error' => 'PDF generation tool is not available.',
            ], 500);
        }

        // Ensure output directory exists
        if (!is_dir(self::OUTPUT_DIRECTORY)) {
            mkdir(self::OUTPUT_DIRECTORY, 0755, true);
        }

        // Use Symfony Process with an argument array to avoid shell injection.
        // Each element is passed as a separate argument to the executable,
        // so no shell interpretation occurs.
        $process = new Process([
            self::WKHTMLTOPDF_BINARY,
            '--page-size',
            $pageSize,
            '--quiet',
            '--disable-javascript',
            '--no-stop-slow-scripts',
            '--disable-local-file-access',
            '--enable-local-file-access', // only for the specific input file
            $inputPath,
            $outputPath,
        ]);

        // Set a timeout to prevent hanging processes
        $process->setTimeout(60);

        try {
            $process->run();

            if (!$process->isSuccessful()) {
                \Log::error('wkhtmltopdf failed', [
                    'exit_code' => $process->getExitCode(),
                    'error_output' => $process->getErrorOutput(),
                    'page_size' => $pageSize,
                    'input' => $sanitizedInputFile,
                    'output' => $sanitizedFilename,
                ]);

                return response()->json([
                    'error' => 'PDF generation failed.',
                ], 500);
            }

            // Verify the output file was created
            if (!file_exists($outputPath)) {
                return response()->json([
                    'error' => 'PDF file was not created.',
                ], 500);
            }

            return response()->json([
                'success' => true,
                'message' => 'PDF report generated successfully.',
                'filename' => $sanitizedFilename . '.pdf',
                'page_size' => $pageSize,
            ]);
        } catch (\Symfony\Component\Process\Exception\ProcessTimedOutException $e) {
            \Log::error('wkhtmltopdf timed out', [
                'input' => $sanitizedInputFile,
                'output' => $sanitizedFilename,
            ]);

            return response()->json([
                'error' => 'PDF generation timed out.',
            ], 504);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            \Log::error('PDF generation exception', [
                'message' => $e->getMessage(),
            ]);

            return response()->json([
                'error' => 'An unexpected error occurred during PDF generation.',
            ], 500);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Download a previously generated PDF report.
     */
    public function download(Request $request, string $filename)
    {
        $sanitizedFilename = $this->sanitizeFilename($filename);
        if ($sanitizedFilename === null) {
            return response()->json([
                'error' => 'Invalid filename.',
            ], 422);
        }

        $filePath = self::OUTPUT_DIRECTORY . $sanitizedFilename . '.pdf';

        if (!file_exists($filePath)) {
            return response()->json([
                'error' => 'PDF file not found.',
            ], 404);
        }

        return response()->download($filePath, $sanitizedFilename . '.pdf', [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/pdf',
        ]);
    }

    /**
     * Sanitize a filename to prevent path traversal and injection.
     * Returns null if the filename is invalid.
     */
    private function sanitizeFilename(string $filename): ?string
    {
        // Strip any file extension the user may have included
        $filename = pathinfo($filename, PATHINFO_FILENAME);

        // Only allow alphanumeric characters, hyphens, and underscores
        if (!preg_match('/^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$/', $filename)) {
            return null;
        }

        // Ensure reasonable length
        if (strlen($filename) === 0 || strlen($filename) > 200) {
            return null;
        }

        return $filename;
    }
}
